returns._0: True if caller can approve the action
True if rollback can be initiated

configureMultisig(address[],uint256).details: Gas consumption is bounded by MAX_SIGNERS constant

params.members: Array of council member addresses (must be COUNCIL_SIZE)

emergencyPause().details: For MULTISIG/DECENTRALIZED modes, use initiatePause() or initiateCouncilPause()

returns._0: Admin address or zero if not applicable

initiateCouncilPause().details: SEQ#8 compliant: Emergency pause requires 5/9 council members

setGovernanceMode(uint8).details: Access control:      - TRAINING: admin only → CENTRALIZED      - CENTRALIZED: admin only → MULTISIG      - MULTISIG: required signatures → DECENTRALIZED      - DECENTRALIZED: Security Council + Time Lock

DOWNGRADE_TIMELOCK().notice: Time lock for downgrade transitions (30 days)

MAX_SIGNERS().notice: Maximum number of signers (gas limit protection)

PAUSE_THRESHOLD().notice: Emergency pause threshold for DECENTRALIZED mode (5/9)

TRAINING_EXIT_TIMELOCK().notice: Time lock for TRAINING -> CENTRALIZED transition (3 days)

UPGRADE_TIMELOCK().notice: Time lock for MULTISIG -> DECENTRALIZED transition (7 days)

canApprove(bytes4,address).notice: Check if caller can approve an action

canInitiateRollback().notice: Check if emergency rollback is available (DECEN-011)

finalizeTransition().notice: Finalize pending transition after time lock

finalizeUpgrade().notice: Finalize pending upgrade after time lock expires

getApprover(bytes4).notice: Get approver address for a specific action

initiateCouncilPause().notice: Initiate pause in DECENTRALIZED mode (requires 5/9 Security Council threshold)

initiatePause().notice: Initiate pause in MULTISIG mode (requires threshold)

initiateTransition(uint8).notice: Initiate mode transition with time lock (DECEN-010)

isPausedStrict().notice: Check if system is paused (strict - doesn't auto-expire)

isTimeLockActive().notice: Check if time lock is active for pending upgrade

isTrainingMode().notice: Check if system is in training mode (DECEN-009)
